scripts.check: node --check backend/src/server.js && npm --prefix frontend run build
scripts.android:add: npm.cmd run frontend:build && cap add android
scripts.android:sync: node scripts/patch-capacitor-gradle.cjs && npm.cmd run frontend:build && cap sync android && node scripts/patch-capacitor-gradle.cjs
scripts.android:open: npm.cmd run android:sync && cap open android
scripts.android:build: npm.cmd run android:sync && cd android && gradlew.bat assembleDebug --parallel --build-cache --no-daemon
scripts.android:build:offline: npm.cmd run android:sync && cd android && gradlew.bat assembleDebug --offline --parallel --build-cache --no-daemon
scripts.android:release:apk: npm.cmd run android:sync && cd android && gradlew.bat assembleRelease --parallel --build-cache --no-daemon
scripts.android:release:aab: npm.cmd run android:sync && cd android && gradlew.bat bundleRelease --parallel --build-cache --no-daemon
scripts.desktop:start: npm --prefix frontend run build && npm --prefix desktop start
scripts.clients:release: npm.cmd run android:release:apk && npm.cmd run desktop:build
